title: assume-guarantee composition
manager: Assume-guarantee reasoning — each member declares what it assumes of its environment and guarantees in return, and the system is proven correct by discharging those obligations against each other, with session-typed wiring checks from the interfaces. This is the formal machinery behind composed checking: it is how you turn "each part is correct" into "the whole is correct" without re-proving the whole system from scratch every time.
cs: member interface contracts (assumes/guarantees) + composition argument; session-typed wiring checks from interfaces; the A/G machinery under F6 (W8.13).
